hero.subtitulo: Find the best flight deals and book your next adventure with AKMLEVA

caracteristicas.subtitulo: Enjoy premium flight booking with exclusive benefits and outstanding service.
caracteristicas.coberturaGlobalDesc: Access flights to thousands of destinations worldwide through our extensive airline partnerships.
caracteristicas.reservaSeguraDesc: Your personal and payment information is protected with state‑of‑the‑art security measures.
caracteristicas.pagamentosFlexiveisDesc: Choose from multiple payment options: cards, digital wallets, and installments.
caracteristicas.suporte24hDesc: Our dedicated support team is available 24/7 to help with all your travel needs.
caracteristicas.confortoBordoDesc: Enjoy complimentary amenities, entertainment, and Wi‑Fi on selected flights.
caracteristicas.bagagemGenerosaDesc: Benefit from generous baggage allowances and flexible upgrade options.
caracteristicas.programaFidelidadeDesc: Earn miles on every booking and redeem them for exclusive upgrades and perks.
caracteristicas.melhoresPrecosDesc: Find the best deals with our price-match guarantee and exclusive discounts.
caracteristicas.pronto: Ready to book your next adventure?

faq.subtitulo: Everything you need to know to travel with peace of mind.
faq.pergunta1: What’s included in the flight price?
faq.resposta1: The price includes the base fare, taxes, and the standard baggage allowance according to the airline policy. Additional services may be available for purchase.
faq.pergunta2: Can I cancel or change my flight?
faq.resposta2: Yes. Cancellation and change policies depend on the fare purchased. Flexible fares allow changes without penalties, while promotional fares may have restrictions.
faq.resposta3: Online check‑in is available 24–48 hours before departure via our website or the airline’s app. Airport check‑in counters open 2–3 hours before departure.
faq.pergunta4: Which documents do I need for international flights?
faq.resposta4: For international travel you typically need a valid passport, a visa (if required), and any health documents required. Check the specific requirements for your destination.
